Business: Fresh Nest Upholstery Cleaning
Owner: Sergii
Location: Buffalo, NY

Primary services:
- Sofa & Sectional Cleaning — starts at $89
- Chair & Armchair Cleaning — starts at $49
- Mattress Cleaning — starts at $69
- Car Interior Cleaning — starts at $79
Final price depends on size and condition, confirmed after a photo estimate.

Service area:
Buffalo, Amherst, Williamsville, Clarence, Clarence Center, East Amherst, Cheektowaga, Lancaster, Tonawanda, West Seneca, Orchard Park, Depew (NY).

Contact:
- Phone: (716) 204-6437
- Email: freshnestbuffalo@gmail.com

Website: https://freshnestbuffalo.com

Pages:
- / — homepage, all services
- /sofa-cleaning-buffalo-ny — Sofa Cleaning Buffalo NY (dedicated service page)

Notes:
- Owner-operated — every job performed personally by the owner.
- Equipment: professional Mytee hot water extraction.
- Availability: 7 days a week, same-day in most cases.
- Guarantee: results explained realistically before work begins; if not satisfied, the owner reviews the issue and works to make it right. No refund or complete stain/odor removal is promised.
